title: Intex Swim Ring
features: Comfortable, lightweight, handy, safe and practical
Swim ring diameter 61 cm, made of transparent material with printed top with 3 different colourful designs, starfish, fish and circles, ages 3-6
Assorted product, you can not choose the color/pattern you want, random choice
description: From the manufacturer About Us At Intex, everything we do centers around quality, value and family time. Our affordable products are built to last, just like the memories made by the people who use them. Intex Recreation Corp. distributes airbeds, above ground pools, spas, toys, furniture, boats and more. We’re part of a worldwide family of companies with more than 50 years of history behind us. Our vision is to be the most recognizable, trusted and innovative company in our industry. We routinely test finished products to make sure they meet our elevated standards for quality, safety and value. Overview offering a wide range of affordable and high-quality inflatable products, including airbeds, pools, spas, furniture, and boats. Their products are designed to be easy to set up and use, making them ideal for families and outdoor enthusiasts. Intex offers a range of inflatable boats, kayaks, and rafts, which are made from durable materials that can withstand regular use. Intex's products are known for their affordability, durability, and ease of use, making them a reliable choice for those who want to enjoy the benefits of outdoor recreation.
